title: The Souler Opposite
review_summary: An original love story with perfect humor offers hopeful insights on life, featuring impressive performances by Chris Meloni; desires for similar quality works to continue.

title: Reckless
review_summary: The reviewer enjoyed this late 90s mini-series featuring Robson Greene's heartfelt romance performance; though it includes some clichés, it's not cheesy or overextended—suggesting perhaps only needing two episodes instead of three. The series is watchable with its mix of genres while hinting at an upcoming sequel.
